feedItems.description: allocated £134.4m to Adult Social Care (≈£420 per resident)
allocated £93.3m to Children's Social Care (≈£292 per resident)
allocated £32.6m to Public Health (≈£102 per resident)
raised Band D council tax by £87 (4.3%) to £2111
